case_title: SANTIAGO FARIAS VS. MATTHEW DE LOACHE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,809.00 FILED BY FARIAS, SANTIAGO AS TO DEFENDANT DE LOACHE, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARIAS, SANTIAGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LOACHE, MATTHEW $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MATTHEW DE LOACHE ON 09-11-14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARIAS, SANTIAGO AS TO DEFENDANT DE LOACHE, MATTHEW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-13-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE LOACHE, MATTHEW
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW. FILED BY FARIAS, SANTIAGO DE LOACHE, MATTHEW
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
